title: Chapter 1: The Current State of Modern Racing

text_block_list.text: 『――The history of the Twinkle Series. It is the glorious trail left behind by our predecessors』
『Great achievements, prestige, legends……all have been forged. If you unravel the history books, an array of breathtakingly beautiful "trails" are lined up』
『A myriad of true stories that make your heart race with every turn of the page. And beyond them, someday――』
One day at work, my smartphone alarm suddenly went off. If this calendar alarm is ringing, that means——
choice_data_list: Ah! Today's the school newspaper distribution!
Oh! Today's the school newspaper distribution!

text_block_list.text: The school newspaper is published once a month by the PR Committee……covering various news and events within the academy
——Among its contents, the monthly column is especially worth reading. I always looked forward to picking up the paper just for that.
choice_data_list: Excuse me, I'd like a copy please!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes……Here you go.
choice_data_list: Thanks, as always!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
N-No……You're welcome.
Thank you for always picking one up.

I quickly unfold the newspaper I received.
Titled "Musings on History," it was the very column I was looking for——

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『Due to an injury suffered in her childhood, her debut was delayed……Even after her debut, things didn't go smoothly, and her results in the Japanese Derby were lackluster』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『However, she kept running. She took the 2-Win and 3-Win classes—— then surged after the Meguro Kinen. Radiating an amber brilliance, she won the Arima Kinen』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『――A Horsegirl who received her discipline and teachings exists in the present day. A late bloomer who pushed past a rested spring to blossom in the autumn――』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『During the interview, she murmured "I feel like I can finally stand shoulder-to-shoulder with my peers. That's why――I'm going to seize it, just like this"』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『History bears witness. Before long, she will become a great figure decorated with graded stakes victories. The story begins at the very first Tokyo race of the New Year. (Writer C)』
choice_data_list: (Wow. this column's really fascinating)
(Yeah. this column's really interesting)

text_block_list.text: It doesn't just introduce history. By tying it to the past, it introduces currently active Horsegirl――connecting it to the present. That's the charm of this column.
choice_data_list: The author… I wonder who Writer C is?

text_block_list.text: As I mutter, I check the calendar. —It looks like the Horsegirl featured in the column is racing on the Friday right after the New Year.
choice_data_list: I've got some time to kill, so I think I'll go!

text_block_list.text: The day finally arrived. Since there was still some time before the race, I decided to visit the Horsegirl Museum, and…….
choice_data_list: Ah, the girl who always gives me the newspaper…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ………Their will is still connected to the present day. No matter how many times I see it……over and over…….

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
……Fufu.
Maybe I'll go around one more time…….
After touring the Horsegirl Museum, I visited the paddock, and she was there as well.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
choice_data_list: (S-She's taking photos so intently…)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……Hmmー. I might have stopped down the lens too much. Let's open it up a bit more……and take a few more shots.
This time I spot her in the stands. In her hand, she's carrying a sports newspaper she likely bought this morning.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……At 2000 meters, this course demands explosive speed too……But, her previous race was on the same track, and with that closing time——it should be no problem.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Her final training and the word from the reporters are are excellent… The top favorite is #2. ——Performance and reputation have finally caught up with her.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Judging by the paddock, #3 looked good too, but…… on today's track, she won't be out-sprinted. Besides, from a historical standpoint as well——

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Today, if she wins, it'll be incredibly hype.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: She's broken clear! It's #2! #2! With an incredible burst of speed, she's snatched the victory!!
choice_data_list: Incredible! That girl who was featured in the column…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
……Hh……uuh……
h-hgh……!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaaaaah……!!
choice_data_list: (S-She's really crying her eyes out…!?)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Uu, uuu……――Ah…….
choice_data_list: Eh?! Are you alright?!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry……
For making you worry……
choice_data_list: You gave me a scare, suddenly getting all dizzy like that

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm truly sorry… I'm alright now.
…It happens sometimes. Just a bit of dizziness…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I ended up skipping my meal today… I knew that getting worked up would lead to this… but even so…
choice_data_list: In that case, let's go find something to eat right away!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …………U-Um. Well…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I can't do that…
choice_data_list: Huh… why not?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I want to check the paddock… and the entrance to the main track too… So, I don't have time to eat…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I want to watch the next race properly, too. Everything from the entrance to the start of the race… all of it…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because a race is the very moment that history is born.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I want to be present and bear witness to it all. It's not enough to just track the data―I have to be at the track. I want to feel the live impact of the moment as it happens.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because that, too, becomes a part of my own history.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ――…Oh, I-I'm sorry! I just started rambling…! Basically, all I'm saying is that I don't want to miss a single part of the race…!
choice_data_list: I-I see…

text_block_list.text: Despite her gentle demeanor, I'm taken aback by the sheer resolve in her voice. But letting her go on like this without any food—
choice_data_list: Ah… right. If I recall, in my pocket—

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Good… a perfect start. ……The pace is slow, too. Just as I predicted. Now she just needs to stay patient…… *munch munch*……

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Here she comes. Just like that… keep it up…! ………Phew. Both the pace and the positioning were perfect. A solid run that lived up to her status as the favorite… *munch munch*…
choice_data_list: (S-She's multitasking like a pro…!)
(S-She's multitasking like a pro…!)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry for being a burden today…! Not only did you share your food with me… but I let you see me in such an embarrassing state…
…I tell her that I understand how she feels. Thinking back on what was written in the school newspaper column, today's race was truly moving.
choice_data_list: Did you come here because you read that column too?
Did you come here because you read that column too?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Well, I wouldn't exactly say I "read" it. Um…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who wrote that…
